name: agentdash
description: AgentDashboard — 统一看板系统，管理多设备、多项目中 AI Agent 的协同工作

scripts.dev: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm run dev:web
scripts.dev:server: cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- migrate && cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- serve
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run kill:backend && cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- migrate && cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- serve
scripts.frontend:build: pnpm run icons:generate && pnpm --filter app-web build
scripts.shared:check: pnpm --filter @agentdash/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentdash/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentdash/views typecheck
scripts.backend:dev: cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- migrate && cargo run --bin agentdash-server -- serve
scripts.backend:clippy: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings -A clippy::too_many_arguments -A clippy::new_ret_no_self -A clippy::type_complexity -A clippy::collapsible_if -A clippy::collapsible_match -A clippy::redundant_closure -A clippy::map_flatten
scripts.contracts:generate: cargo run -p agentdash-contracts --bin generate_contracts_ts && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-runtime-contract --bin generate_agent_runtime_contracts && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-service-api --bin generate_agent_service_api && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-runtime-wire --bin generate_agent_runtime_wire
scripts.contracts:check: cargo run -p agentdash-integration-codex --bin generate_codex_vendor_protocol -- check && cargo run -p agentdash-contracts --bin generate_contracts_ts -- --check && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-runtime-contract --bin generate_agent_runtime_contracts -- --check && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-service-api --bin generate_agent_service_api -- --check && cargo run -p agentdash-agent-runtime-wire --bin generate_agent_runtime_wire -- --check
